title: Cycle Results: Yuri Grom Holds All Priority Systems
body: After a cycle of intense combat activity, Yuri Grom successfully defended all Alpha and Beta priority systems against coordinated Hudson and Archer undermining attempts. CMDR turnout was exceptional — over 3,200 reinforcement runs logged at Fong Wang alone. The cycle ends with a net gain of six exploited systems and two new Stronghold designations.

title: New Hunting Grounds Designated: Areklici Added
body: Following a strategic review, Areklici has been added as a secondary combat merit hunting ground alongside Lei Kax. CMDRs are advised to check Discord for current activity levels at both locations before jumping in.
